languages.original_text: "Excellent. I will make my appearance in the thick of things — may my arrival be a surprise to your Lord Inquisitor."

languages.text: "Прекрасно. Я появлюсь прямо на месте событий — пускай мое прибытие станет сюрпризом для твоего сородича".
"Excellent. I will make my appearance in the thick of things — may my arrival be a surprise to your Lord Inquisitor."

languages.text: «Excelente. Apareceré cuando haya comenzado; que mi llegada sea una sorpresa para tu Lord Inquisidor».
languages.original_text: "Excellent. I will make my appearance in the thick of things — may my arrival be a surprise to your Lord Inquisitor."

traits.locale_text: «Excelente. Apareceré cuando haya comenzado; que mi llegada sea una sorpresa para tu Lord Inquisidor».

languages.text: “很好。我会在关键时刻现身，希望我的到来能给你那位大审判官一个惊喜。”
languages.original_text: "Excellent. I will make my appearance in the thick of things — may my arrival be a surprise to your Lord Inquisitor."

traits.locale_text: “很好。我会在关键时刻现身，希望我的到来能给你那位大审判官一个惊喜。”

languages.text: « Excellent. Je ferai mon apparition dans le feu de l'action, pour prendre votre seigneur inquisiteur par surprise. »
languages.original_text: "Excellent. I will make my appearance in the thick of things — may my arrival be a surprise to your Lord Inquisitor."

traits.locale_text: « Excellent. Je ferai mon apparition dans le feu de l'action, pour prendre votre seigneur inquisiteur par surprise. »

languages.text: "Mükemmel. Karşılaşma gerçekleştiği sırada ortaya çıkacağım. gelişim, Lord Engizisyoncu'ya sürpriz olacak."
languages.original_text: "Excellent. I will make my appearance in the thick of things — may my arrival be a surprise to your Lord Inquisitor."

traits.locale_text: "Mükemmel. Karşılaşma gerçekleştiği sırada ortaya çıkacağım. gelişim, Lord Engizisyoncu'ya sürpriz olacak."

languages.text: "Ausgezeichnet. Ich werde mich in das Getümmel stürzen ... und deinen Großinquisitor mit meiner Ankunft überraschen."
languages.original_text: "Excellent. I will make my appearance in the thick of things — may my arrival be a surprise to your Lord Inquisitor."

traits.locale_text: "Ausgezeichnet. Ich werde mich in das Getümmel stürzen ... und deinen Großinquisitor mit meiner Ankunft überraschen."

languages.text: 「素晴らしい。私は騒ぎの中に出現する。私の到着が、貴方の枢機卿に驚きを与えれば。」
languages.original_text: "Excellent. I will make my appearance in the thick of things — may my arrival be a surprise to your Lord Inquisitor."

traits.locale_text: 「素晴らしい。私は騒ぎの中に出現する。私の到着が、貴方の枢機卿に驚きを与えれば。」
